column1: # Format: CSV with header row. One sample per line.
#   - write one sample name per line to the 'samples_file:' path in your config
#   - infer 'fastq_dir:' as the parent directory of the first fastq_1 path
#   sample    - sample name matching FASTQ filename prefix
#   fastq_1   - absolute path to R1 (forward) FASTQ file (.fastq.gz)
#   fastq_2   - absolute path to R2 (reverse) FASTQ file (.fastq.gz)
# All FASTQs should reside in the same directory; fastq_dir is inferred from fastq_1.
# Optional: Titan integration (append to each row; leave blank if unused)
